name: play stats with yds_gained filter on one column only does not leak to siblings
description: Regression for measure-batch group_key bug: when one play-stat column carries a per-column filter (yds_gained) and sibling play-stat columns sharing the same apply_filters source do not, the sibling columns must NOT inherit the filter. Previously they all batched into one CTE keyed by apply_filters.toString().
expected_query: with "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2024.tm) as teams from "player_gamelogs_year_2024" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) group by "player_gamelogs_year_2024"."pid"), "rate_aggregate_83a94558a51c" as materialized (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, SUM(rush_yds) AS m_30e30c8bc773 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."yds_gained" between 15 and 99 group by nfl_plays.bc_pid), "rate_aggregate_09bb0497dc3f" as materialized (select COALESCE(nfl_plays.bc_pid, nfl_plays.trg_pid) AS pid, SUM(mbt) AS m_6f7d8381cdd4 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by COALESCE(nfl_plays.bc_pid, nfl_plays.trg_pid)), "rate_aggregate_577ad02ec5d8" as materialized (select nfl_plays.bc_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS m_e1309d0d6edd from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.bc_pid) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_83a94558a51c.m_30e30c8bc773) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS rush_yds_from_plays_0, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_09bb0497dc3f.m_6f7d8381cdd4) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS broken_tackles_from_plays_0, CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_577ad02ec5d8.m_e1309d0d6edd) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS rush_atts_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2" on "t3d2efe2602a05b1642021b304ba51fb2"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_83a94558a51c" on "rate_aggregate_83a94558a51c"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_09bb0497dc3f" on "rate_aggregate_09bb0497dc3f"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_577ad02ec5d8" on "rate_aggregate_577ad02ec5d8"."pid" = "player"."pid" where player.pos IN ('RB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 6 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 10
